channel.title: Benchmark on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Benchmark on jamesm.blog

item.title: GPT-5.5 Is Here: Real Step Forward or Quiet Iteration?
item.description: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 on April 23, 2026 - the first fully retrained base model since GPT-4.5. A look at the benchmarks, the new features, and whether this release actually matters.

item.title: Claude Mythos: The AI Benchmark Breaker That Won't Be Released
item.description: Claude Mythos Preview shattered AI benchmarks with 93.9% SWE-bench and 97.6% USAMO scores, but remains restricted to security partners due to cybersecurity risks.
